message:
bd-3akdb.2: Implement IncrementalView trait with StyleResolutionView and FilteredListView

Adds the IncrementalView<K, V> trait for delta-propagation views with
apply_delta, full_recompute, materialized_size, domain, and label methods.
Includes two concrete implementations: StyleResolutionView (theme base_hash
XOR per-widget overrides with deduplication) and FilteredListView (predicate-
based filtering with all_items/visible subset tracking). 15 new tests (41 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
